title: Business ownership
summary: 9609 AS — sole traders, partnerships, private and public limited companies, and ownership choice.
learningObjectives: Explain limited liability and its importance.
Analyse advantages and disadvantages of each form.

simpleExplanation.title: Legal structure matters
simpleExplanation.summary: Sole traders and partnerships have unlimited liability; Ltd and PLC limit owners' financial risk to their investment.
steps: Sole trader: full control, unlimited liability.
Partnership: shared skills; deed of partnership advised.
Ltd: private shares, limited liability, no public share sale.
PLC: shares traded publicly — greater finance, more regulation.

sections.content: **Business ownership** (1.2.2) is a staple **Paper 1** topic. Use **two-column pros/cons** then **recommendation** for scenario questions.
Limited liability protects **personal assets** — distinguish from **limited by guarantee** (charities) if mentioned in stem.
